description: Legal query addressed to Maṣliaḥ Gaon (r. 1127–1139 CE). In Judaeo-Arabic. Written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138). Also signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen and Nathan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver. Halakhic question concerning a possible excommunication over a legal dispute. Mentions a reclamation document (ורקה אלדעאוי), al-Kohen Abū l-Faraj, al-Melammed Sayyid al-Kull the cantor and Ṣadaqa. Regarding certain claims on clothing, on tamarind (kept on hand as medicine for when they fell sick), 43 dinars and 20 dirhams between husband and father of divorcee. Husband refuses to pay alimony (mezonot) to the amount of 1 dirham. (Information from CUDL and from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: שאלה משפטית המופנית למצליח גאון בנוגע לנידוי בגלל סכסוך משפטי
